description_long: This is a modern two-story house featuring a flat roof and a striking combination of white, gray, and natural wood exterior finishes. The front facade includes a large overhanging roof that shelters a carport, with landscaped planters and trees enhancing the curb appeal. Expansive windows of varying shapes and sizes are asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the house features a private fenced yard with a small pool and additional greenery, while the side elevations reveal more wood paneling and geometric window placements. The structure is composed of clean lines, boxy volumes, and open outdoor spaces, reflecting a minimalist architectural style. The main entryway is recessed beneath the overhang, flanked by plants and accessed via a paved walkway.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, wood and white facades, large windows, and a sheltered carport. Features landscaped surroundings and a private backyard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, carport under a large overhang, and landscaped planters with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a visible parked car, extended roof, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, pool, wood paneling, and multiple large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional landscaping, wood fencing, and geometric window features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath a large overhang, flanked by planters and accessed via a paved walkway, with a minimalist door and no visible steps.
